duas.title: Dua after Ziyarat Ashura
duas.description: You may then offer a two-unit prayer and when you finish, you may say the Dua below:

segments.translation: O Allah, I have offered a prayer for You

segments.transliteration: wa laka raka`tu wa laka sajadtu
segments.translation: and I have genuflected and prostrated myself for You
alone without setting any partner to You,
because prayers,
genuflections, and prostrations are illegal for anyone save You,

segments.arabic: لاِنَّكَ انْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاََ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ انْتَ
segments.transliteration: li'annaka anta allahu alladhi la ilaha illa anta
segments.translation: because You are Allah; there is no god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
convey to them the most favorite salutations and greetings from me,
and convey to me their response to my greeting.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa hatani alrrak`atani hadiyyatun minni
segments.translation: O Allah, these two units of prayer are a present from me
to my master al-Husayn the son of `Ali,
peace be upon both of them.
O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and upon him,
accept these two units of prayer from me, and reward me for them

segments.arabic: افْضَلَ امَلِي وَرَجَائِي فِيكَ وَفِي وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: afdala amali wa raja'i fika wa fi waliyyika
segments.translation: by granting me the best of my hope and expectation in you and in Your Friend,
O Guardian of the believers!
Peace be upon al-Husayn the son of `Ali,
the wronged and martyred,
the victim of shed tears,
and the captive of agonies.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اشْهَدُ انَّهُ وَلِيُّكَ وَٱبْنُ وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna ashhadu annahu waliyyuka wabnu waliyyika
segments.translation: O Allah, I do bear witness that he is Your intimate friend and the son of Your intimate friend
and Your choicest one who revolted to demand with Your right.
You have thus honored him with Your honor,
sealed his lifetime with martyrdom,
made him one of the chiefs
and one of the leaders,
honored him with immaculate birth,
gave him the inheritances of the prophets,

segments.arabic: وَجَعَلْتَهُ حُجَّةً عَلَىٰ خَلْقِكَ مِنَ ٱلاوْصِيَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa ja`altahu hujjatan `ala khalqika min al-awsiya'i
segments.translation: and made him argument against Your creatures and one of the Successors.
So, he called to You flawlessly,
gave advice,
and sacrificed himself for Your sake

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ ٱسْتَنْقَذَ عِبَادَكَ مِنَ ٱلْجَهَالَةِ وَحَيْرَةِ ٱلضَّلاَلَةِ
segments.transliteration: hatta istanqadha `ibadaka min aljahalati wa hayrati alddalalati
segments.translation: until he could save Your servants from ignorance and perplexity of straying off.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ تَوَازَرَ عَلَيْهِ مَنْ غَرَّتْهُ ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa qad tawazara `alayhi man gharrat-hu alddunya
segments.translation: Yet, those whom were seduced by this worldly life,

segments.transliteration: wa ba`a hazzahu min al-akhirati bil-adna
segments.translation: those who sold their share of the Hereafter with the lowly price,
those who perished because of following their desires,
those who brought to themselves Your wrath and the wrath of Your Prophet,

segments.arabic: وَاطَاعَ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ اوْلِي ٱلشِّقَاقِ وَٱلنِّفَاقِ
segments.transliteration: wa ata`a min `ibadika uli alshshiqaqi walnnifaqi
segments.translation: and those who obeyed the dissident and hypocritical servants of You
and the bearers of the burdens (of sins) who deserve Hellfire—all those supported each other against him;
so, he fought against them with steadfastness and expectation of Your reward,
facing them courageously, never turning back,

segments.arabic: لاََ تَاخُذُهُ فِي ٱللَّهِ لَوْمَةُ لاَئِمٍ
segments.transliteration: la ta'khudhuhu fi allahi lawmatu la'imin
segments.translation: and never fearing the blame of anyone concerning carrying out his duty towards You
until his blood was shed while he was in obedience to You
and his inviolability was also infringed.
O Allah, curse them with incessant curses
and chastise them with painful chastisement
